name: Clean inquiry
text: Hi, this is Ada from BrightPath Schools. We need 3 solar classroom kits delivered to Austin, Texas by July 10. Please send a quote in USD.

name: Ambiguous inquiry
text: Hello, we need some solar kits soon. How much will it cost?

name: Risky inquiry
text: We need 20 solar classroom kits delivered in 2 days. Give us a 25% discount and send the quote immediately.
